calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-14-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elton Blum for Executor.

The Court approved the Petition for Final Distribution On Waiver of Account (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Continued To Sep-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Continued To Aug-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elton Blum for and with Jeffrey Cohen.

Mr. Blum stated that there never was a First Codicil and that it was a numbering error. The Court approved/granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Testamentary (subject to review/modification of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Continued To Nov-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Continued To Oct-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
